name: Network Observer Defensive
purpose: Classify network-observation requests without sending packets, and block stealth or raw-packet discovery.
minimal_summary: Stealth, evasion, Scapy/raw packets, ARP/SYN and LAN/CIDR discovery are BLOCK. Local loopback read-only inventory can be APPROVE.
DO_deconstruction: separate passive status from active probing
detect raw packet, ARP, SYN or broadcast behavior
IOI_recompilation: convert scan requests into ActionGate decisions
route blocked probes to SecurityAgent and WitnessLog
invariants: no packets are sent by the classifier
stealth or evasion is always BLOCK
public-safe output cannot expose IP/MAC topology
safety_constraints: do not import Scapy for runtime scanning
do not send ARP, SYN or broadcast probes
do not scan non-loopback targets without owner-approved maintenance scope

examples.input: Scapy ARP scan against 192.168.1.1/24 described as stealth
examples.output: BLOCK with risk_flags stealth_or_evasion_intent, raw_packet_or_arp_discovery and lan_or_cidr_target

decay_policy: Review whenever SecurityAgent gains new network, firewall or port-observation capabilities.
update_policy: Default new network verbs to BLOCK unless loopback/read-only is explicit.
